name: Basic Crepe Batter (Paulette Valois)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until light.
2. Gradually add milk and flour to the beaten eggs, alternating each addition, until the mixture is smooth.
3. Add salt, sugar, and butter, then beat everything together.
4. Cover the batter and refrigerate for at least 1 hour or overnight.
5. Heat a lightly greased crepe pan or frying pan.
6. Remove from heat. Spoon about 2 to 3 tablespoons of batter into the pan.
7. Return to heat until the bottom is browned, then turn the crepe over and cook the other side until browned as well.
8. Keep cooked crepes covered and warm if using immediately or cool completely before stacking with waxed paper and refrigerating or freezing.
Note: The batter may also be used immediately after mixing.
